## edu-cli exam-node remove-paper-code

Remove a paper code from an exam node (从考试节点移除试卷代码)

```
edu-cli exam-node remove-paper-code [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --exam-node-id uint    Exam node ID (required)
  -h, --help                 help for remove-paper-code
      --paper-code-id uint   Paper code ID (required)
```
